chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1852 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.11.2016. For orders on statement as flagged. -.-.-. None present for petitioner. A statement has been filed on behalf of petitioner’s Counsel Mr. Nasrullah Khaskheli that he does not want to press the above Constitutional Petition. The matter is fixed in additional list and the Counsel is not present. This casual attitude is not acceptable. However, as an indulgence the statement is considered. I have seen the vakalatnama of the Counsel available in record, which, inter alia, authorizes him to compromise or withdraw the case. This petition is consequently dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Ali Haider
